posts.title: How to use React hooks?
posts.content: I'm building a component and I'm confused about when to use useState vs useEffect.

posts.title: SQL JOIN explanation?
posts.content: Can someone explain the difference between INNER JOIN and LEFT JOIN?

posts.title: Node.js memory leak fix?
posts.content: My Node.js server slows down over time. How do I detect and fix memory leaks?

comments.content: Use useState for local state and useEffect for side effects like fetching data.
Check the official docs at react.dev for a great breakdown.
INNER JOIN returns only matching rows; LEFT JOIN returns all rows from the left table.
